scripts.test: esbuild test/openai-tools.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.test/openai-tools.test.mjs --packages=external && esbuild test/openai-tools-mapping.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.test/openai-tools-mapping.test.mjs --packages=external && esbuild test/policy-matrix.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.test/policy-matrix.test.mjs --packages=external && esbuild test/proxy-observability.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.test/proxy-observability.test.mjs --packages=external && node --test .test/openai-tools.test.mjs .test/openai-tools-mapping.test.mjs .test/policy-matrix.test.mjs .test/proxy-observability.test.mjs
